title: Custom URLs and custom target email addresses for items and forms
excerpt:
It will be great if the URLs for forms and boards, and the emails for “send to board” could be customized. 
The URL or email address can have one part preset for the entire deployment (e.g. company name, or the like) but…

posts.author: jshachaf (Joe Shachaf)
posts.cookedHtml:
It will be great if the URLs for forms and boards, and the emails for “send to board” could be customized.
The URL or email address can have one part preset for the entire deployment (e.g. company name, or the like) but then the user will be able to add a custom part, so it will be easier to read and remember.
Something like “company-myboard@monday.com”
And “monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done”
